title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hitachi India South Asia Partners - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hitachi India South Asia Partners - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Hitachi India South Asia Partners in Madurai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hitachi India South Asia Partners:
Hitachi India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hitachi India South Asia Partners!
